ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Orange, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw
Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant

ingredients_text: sugar, cocoa mass, cocoa butter, almonds 6%, orange peel 1%, emulsifier (lecithins (soya)), glucose-fructose syrup, natural flavor, vanilla extract, acidifier (citric acid), cocoa 56 %, traces of  nuts , traces of  milk
